person.name: Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton

nameForms.fullText: Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton

person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
WALTER DE LINDSAY, Lord of Lamberton, Molesworth, etc., Sheriff of Berwickshire, and Justiciar of Lothian, inherited a vast property in Lancashire and Westmoreland (including most of what is known as the Lake District), in right of his mother, and paid a fine of two marks of gold to be respited from taking knighthood against his will, and he further delayed it to make a pilgrimage to the shrine of St. James. He was sixteen years old, 31 Henry in. He granted a charter of liberties to the burgh of Warton in Lancashire, had licence to make a pilgrimage to Spain 1260, and was ambassador to England 1265. His wife's name was Christian, who was married, secondly, in Scotland, to Walter de Percy of Kildale, as attested by King Alexander in. 23 September 1274. This great baron died on All Souls' Day 1271, leaving issue: 

1.) WILLIAM, his heir, and perhaps two others.

2.) Gilbert thought to be identical with Gilbert de Molesworth,

3.) Walter of Parva Lamberton. Probable ancestor of the Lindsays of Thurston.

4.) Margaret, wife of Sir David de Lindsay.

5.) Alicia, wife of John Comyn of Badenoch and Tynedale.

sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy: Matilda la Zouche

zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton於大約1231年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾莫丁頓時，他的父親William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness31歲，母親Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere30歲。他與Christiana Hose在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾藍波頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1271年11月2日在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德享年41歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾藍波頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton于大约1231年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾莫丁頓时，他的父亲William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness31岁，母亲Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere30岁。他与Christiana Hose在苏格兰貝維其可爾藍波頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1271年11月2日在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德享年41岁，埋葬在苏格兰貝維其可爾藍波頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton was born about 1231, in Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, was 31 and his mother, Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere, was 30. He married Christiana Hose in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 2 November 1271, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton est né environ 1231, à Mordington, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Christiana Hose à Lamberton, Berwickshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 2 novembre 1271, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à Lamberton, Berwickshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton um 1231 in Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness 31 und seine Mutter Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere 30. Er hat in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland Christiana Hose geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 2. November 1271 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton è nato il circa 1231 nel Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, il suo padre, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Christiana Hose nel Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 2 novembre 1271, nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lambertonが約1231年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアモーディントンで生まれた時，父William de Lindsay Lord of Luffnessは31歳，母Alice de Lancaster, of Windermereは30歳であった。スコットランドバーウィクシュアイアランバートンでChristiana Hoseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1271年11月2日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで41歳で死去し，スコットランドバーウィクシュアイアランバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton(이)가 대략 1231년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 모르딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere(은)는 30세였다. 그는 스컷랜드 버윅실르 램르턴에서 Christiana Hose(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1271년 11월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 버윅실르 램르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton nasceu aproximadamente 1231, em Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, seu pai, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Christiana Hose em Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de novembro de 1271, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton родился около 1231 г. в местности мордингтон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Christiana Hose в местности лэмбиртон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 2 ноября 1271 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности лэмбиртон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Lindsay Lord of Lamberton nació aproximadamente 1231, en Mordington, Berwickshire, Scotland, su papá, William de Lindsay Lord of Luffness, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Alice de Lancaster, of Windermere, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Christiana Hose en Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 2 de noviembre de 1271, en Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en Lamberton, Berwickshire, Scotland.
